text:
stas        2007-02-20 10:24:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics/djvulibre   Makefile pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    graphics/djvulibre/files patch-tools_any2djvu 
  Log:
  - Remove bash and wget dependency
  - Add missing curl dependency for any2djvu
  - Make any2djvu optional and don't install it by default
  - Don't install empty ja manpages
  - Bump portrevisiono
  
  PR:             ports/109221 (partially based on)
  Submitted by:   Rashid N. Achilov"<achilov-rn@askd.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.52      +24 -17    ports/graphics/djvulibre/Makefile
